{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Reap
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|To [[Reap]] is an event or process that occurs later.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
